nasb.text: For the husband is the head of the wife, as Christ also is the head of the church, He Himself being the Savior of the body.

esv.text: For the husband is the head of the wife even as Christ is the head of the church, his body, and is himself its Savior.

cnv.text: 因為丈夫是妻子的頭，好像基督是教會的頭；基督又是教會全體的救主。

ccb.text: 因为丈夫是妻子的头，正如基督是祂的身体——教会的头，又是教会的救主。

csbs.text: 因为丈夫是妻子的头，正如基督是教会的头；他也是这身体的救主。
